beers.name: Synthwave Portal
beers.desc: The highest-rated pour in the hive. Neon-soaked tropical haze. Riwaka, Citra, Nectaron.

beers.name: Wendy's a Lifeguard
beers.desc: Lush mango, passionfruit, citrus bliss. Simcoe, Vic Secret, Mosaic, Citra.

beers.name: Cake Eater
beers.desc: Award-winning decadence. Pecans, coconut, cocoa nibs, vanilla beans.

beers.name: Flying V
beers.desc: Big, bold, unapologetic. Full-throttle hazy for the adventurous.

beers.name: Look Ma, We're On Tap
beers.desc: DDH Citra, Riwaka, Vic Secret — tropical citrus piled sky high.

beers.name: Strata in the Whirlpool
beers.desc: Strata, Citra, Riwaka. Citrus with a whisper of raspberry.

beers.name: Midlife Crisis
beers.desc: Bold ruby-red IPA with caramel backbone and assertive hop character.

beers.name: Droppin' Hops
beers.desc: Sessionable haze. Citra, Krush, Cashmere, Motueka.

beers.name: Cassville
beers.desc: Smooth, clean, crushable. The perfect pint for any occasion.

beers.name: Norwegian A'Peel
beers.desc: Belgian-style wit with orange peel, coriander, Norwegian kveik yeast.

beers.name: Pub Thumpin'
beers.desc: Low ABV, big flavor. A proper session ale in the British tradition.

beers.name: Peelin' Cute
beers.desc: Rich, velvety, dangerously drinkable. A dessert in a glass.

beers.name: Guava the Nut
beers.desc: Pink guava and coconut. Creamy, floral, and utterly tropical.

beers.name: Berry Boo v2
beers.desc: Blackberry and raspberry — bright, jammy, intensely berry.

beers.name: Electric Shonk
beers.desc: Mango and pineapple — electric tropical sunshine in a glass.

beers.name: Surfer Girl
beers.desc: Ride the sour wave. Fruit-forward and easy to love.

beers.name: Root 93
beers.desc: Homemade root beer — two varieties brewed in-house. "Definitely worth trying."

beers.name: Orange Cream Soda
beers.desc: Smooth, creamy, dreamy. Made right here at Ten Wasp.

beers.name: Ginger Ale
beers.desc: House-made ginger ale with real ginger character.

beers.name: Hop Water
beers.desc: All the aroma of craft hops, zero alcohol. The designated driver's best friend.

food.name: Homemade Pizza
food.desc: Fresh-made rotating varieties. Gluten-free option available.

food.name: Stinger Sticks
food.desc: House-made bread sticks served as cheese bread or dessert bread.

food.name: Bavarian Pretzels
food.desc: Warm, golden, house-made Bavarian pretzels with dipping sauce.

food.name: Soda Floats
food.desc: House-made sodas topped with premium ice cream. A Ten Wasp signature.
